name: Breakfast Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a 9-inch microwave safe plate with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Arrange potato and onion slices on the plate; sprinkle with seasonings.
3. Cover and microwave on high for 5 minutes.
4. Sprinkle with cheese. cover and microwave on high for 4-5 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
